data.title: Bitcoin Could Hit $200,000 By 2025, Driven By Institutional Demand and ETFs: Bernstein
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could soar to $200,000 by the end of 2025, driven by a combination of rising institutional demand and supply reduction following the latest halving.

data.description: DBV Technologies progresses with regulatory efforts for its Viaskin Peanut patch in the U.S. and Europe, while financial concerns loom as the company seeks additional funding to continue its operations.
